sections.title: Fixing of minimum rates of wages
sections.summary: The government is responsible for setting the minimum wage for different types of jobs to ensure workers aren't exploited.
sections.example: Construction workers in Delhi must be paid at least the minimum daily rate set by the Delhi government.

sections.title: Payment of minimum rates of wages
sections.summary: Every employer must pay their workers at least the minimum wage fixed by the law, without any illegal deductions.
sections.example: An employer cannot pay a worker less than the government-mandated rate just because they are 'learning' on the job.
